## Talk Details

**Proposed Title:**

**Target Event:** (e.g., April 2026 event or "Any upcoming event")

**Duration:** 
- Standard talk: 30–40 minutes + Q&A  
- Lightning talk: 5–10 minutes

**Abstract / Description**  
(Please describe what attendees will learn. Feel free to make it beginner-friendly if it fits the event theme.)

**Name:**

**Company / Role:**

**Short Bio:**

## Additional Notes

- Any specific requirements (demo setup, hardware, internet, etc.)?
- Why does this talk fit the current or upcoming event?
- Are you comfortable presenting to a mixed audience (including beginners)?

---

Thank you for proposing a talk!  
We'll review your submission and get back to you as soon as possible.

You can also comment directly on the relevant [event issue](https://github.com/devopsdays-singapore/devops-singapore/issues?q=is%3Aopen+label%3Aevent%2Fupcoming) if you have a quick idea.
